text:
On 18-Sep-99 Will Andrews wrote:
> X# $Id$

To the committer that commits this; sorry about this, the port itself was based
on an older version of the port that I made in June; I forgot to change this to
$FreeBSD$. Don't forget to update it. Thanks!

--
Will Andrews <andrews@technologist.com>
